landing.heroSubtitle: LUCIUS translates the technical language of the market into clear, unbiased and actionable reading — so you decide intelligently, on your time, in full control.
landing.whyDesc: Most investors accumulate information without understanding what it means. LUCIUS exists to flip that equation.
painPoints: You don't really know what's in your portfolio
You receive too much noise and too little clarity
You make decisions without seeing the whole picture
You hear jargon when you needed plain language

lucidity.label: Clear reading
lucidity.desc: Direct translation of your portfolio into plain language.

lucidity.label: Applied intelligence
lucidity.desc: Cutting-edge AI focused on financial education.

lucidity.label: Decision support
lucidity.desc: Educational suggestions. You make the call.

landing.howDesc: No technical complexity. No jargon. In minutes you'll see your portfolio like never before.

steps.title: Create your account
steps.desc: Quick onboarding. No friction, no credit card.

steps.title: Import your portfolio
steps.desc: CSV, XLSX, OFX or PDF — formats your broker already provides.

steps.title: Receive the diagnosis
steps.desc: Risk, liquidity, concentration and the LUCIUS reading in seconds.

steps.title: Act with clarity
steps.desc: Opportunities, scenario simulations and reports to support decisions.

benefits.title: Performance reading
benefits.desc: See what your portfolio is saying — without needing to be an analyst.

benefits.title: Risk, liquidity and concentration
benefits.desc: Three essential views most investors never see clearly.

benefits.title: Strategic opportunities
benefits.desc: Identification of improvement points — without naming specific assets.

benefits.title: Reports on demand
benefits.desc: Elegant PDFs to record decisions, compare periods and organize your reading.

benefits.title: Chat with LUCIUS
benefits.desc: Ask questions in clear language, with the context of your own portfolio.

benefits.title: Simulations and projections
benefits.desc: Test tactical scenarios before acting — comparative reading, not a promise.

audience: Investors who want to understand what they're doing
Investors tired of jargon and market noise
Investors who want to organize and record decisions
landing.pricingDesc: Total transparency. No fine print, no mandatory commitment.
landing.ctaFinalDesc: Import your portfolio in minutes and discover what it's really telling you.
landing.ctaFinalDisclaimer: LUCIUS is software that supports the analysis of portfolio performance and investor understanding. Informative and educational content — it does not constitute advisory, securities offering or order execution. We are not registered with the CVM, ANBIMA or APIMEC. We do not recommend specific funds, stocks or assets. The final decision is exclusively yours. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
